description_long: This object is a large, flat-screen television with a sleek, ultra-thin profile and minimalist design. The front features a wide, glossy display panel with a thin, black bezel framing the screen, supported by two slender, angled legs at the bottom corners. The screen displays a vivid image, suggesting high-resolution capabilities, and the overall construction appears modern and lightweight. The back is plain and matte, with no visible branding or ports, maintaining a clean and streamlined appearance. The side views reveal the extremely slim depth of the television, emphasizing its contemporary engineering. This television would be suitable for placement in living rooms, public waiting areas, or commercial spaces in urban environments.
description: A large, ultra-thin flat-screen television with a glossy display, thin black bezel, and minimalist angled legs. The design is modern and streamlined, suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, glossy display with a thin black bezel and two angled support legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extremely slim profile and the positioning of the support legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, matte back panel with no visible ports or branding, and the two support legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizing the ultra-thin depth and the leg placement.
